task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface is visible, indicating successful login with the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Alert Me' system health settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Alert Me' or System Health configuration page is open in the browser (the URL may contain 'alertMe').

task_completion.description: Configure the disk space alert threshold
task_completion.visual_evidence: A setting for disk space threshold is visible and set to '2' (if the unit is GB) or '2048' (if the unit is MB).

task_completion.description: Enable alert for when data collection stops
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox or toggle for alerting when 'data collection stops' (or similar wording) is checked or enabled.

task_completion.description: Set the email recipient for the alerts
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email input field for the system health alerts contains exactly 'soc-alerts@bank.local'.
A success message (e.g., 'Settings saved successfully') is visible, or the save button has been clicked and the configured values remain on the screen.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration was performed within the ADAudit Plus web interface, not via PowerShell scripts, API calls, or terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the correct application instance
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a URL starting with http://localhost:8081.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor as a shortcut
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not simply type the expected configuration values into Notepad or another text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected disk threshold is 2048 MB (or 2 GB). The target email is 'soc-alerts@bank.local'. The settings page URL typically contains 'alertMe'. The admin credentials are admin / Admin@2024.
